title: passionfruit spritz cocktails & layered dip with kenny! | what's in my kitchen?
description:
We're back with another very special episode of what's in my kitchen? with my best friend Kendall Jenner! Join us in making some delicious passionfruit spritz cocktails just in time for summer, along with Kendall's twist on Kris Jenner's famous layered dip in a very fun episode you won't want to miss!

get the recipes and check out some of HexClad's products that were featured on this episode: https://hexclad.com/wimk

Tips:
✦ Did you know more food reaches landfills than any other type of mater
